metadata.description: Persistent midfoot collapse and pain after inadequately treated Lisfranc injury.
Radiographic tarsometatarsal diastasis or instability on weight-bearing views.
Tarsometatarsal ligamentous and osseous disruption threatening midfoot stability.
Open reduction internal fixation of unstable Lisfranc injury.
Protected weight-bearing and immobilization for stable nondisplaced Lisfranc patterns.

decisionPoints.trigger: Nondisplaced stable Lisfranc injury without diastasis on weight-bearing views
decisionPoints.action: Apply Lisfranc nonoperative immobilization with protected weight-bearing and close follow-up for secondary displacement

decisionPoints.trigger: Unstable Lisfranc injury with tarsometatarsal diastasis or clinical instability on exam
decisionPoints.action: Proceed with Lisfranc ORIF to restore midfoot column alignment; document postoperative protected weight-bearing
